sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
CurrentDate() __time__, -- DUMMY Just to select timeseries format
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` AS __metric__,
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS COUNT

FROM 
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE 
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company`In ($company)
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved')
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assignee Login ID` In ($User)
Group By 
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS 'C1'
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` != 'Closed' 
Or `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` = 'Cancelled' 
Or `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` = 'Resolved' 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS C1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
((`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved') 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
)

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS 'C1'
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assignee` IS NULL 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS C1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assignee` IS NULL) 
 and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
 and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
 and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
 and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
)

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`Data Visualization Definition`.`Name` AS 'C1',
SUM(`FB:History`.`Value`) AS 'C2'
FROM
`Data Visualization Definition` 
INNER JOIN (`FB:History` )
ON (`Data Visualization Definition`.`GUID` = `FB:History`.`Variable System ID`)
WHERE 
(
`Data Visualization Definition`.`Name` = 'HPD:INC:Overdue_Incidents' 

)

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS C1
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE 
(
(`HPD:Help Desk`.`SLM Status` > 'Service Target Warning') 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved')
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)

)

panels.description: Displays the count of the open major incidents where the MI flag is set to ‘Yes’

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS Count
FROM `HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE 
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company`In ($company)
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Major Incident` = 'Yes'
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`< 'Resolved'

panels.title: Open Major Incidents

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
`Select Column Name` AS C1
FROM
`Select Form Name` 

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
AVG(DATEDIFF('day',`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`, CurrentDate())) AS C1
FROM `HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved' 
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)

SELECT DISTINCT
CurrentDate() __time__, -- DUMMY Just to select timeseries format
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` AS __metric__,
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS COUNT

FROM 
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE 
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company`In ($company)
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved')
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assignee Login ID` In ($User)
Group By 
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`

Select CurrentDate() __time__,
T1.SLAStatus __metric__,
T1.COUNT

from (SELECT DISTINCT
  CurrentDate() __time__,-- DUMMY for timeseries format
    CASE
      WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` IN ('5', '7') THEN 'Already Missed'
      WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 9 THEN 'Close to Target'
      WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 2 THEN 'Stopped Clock'
      WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 1 THEN 'Ongoing'
   END AS __metric__,
   CASE
      WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` IN ('5', '7') THEN 'Already Missed'
      WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 9 THEN 'Close to Target'
      WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 2 THEN 'Stopped Clock'
      WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 1 THEN 'Ongoing'
   END AS SLAStatus,
   
   COUNT(DISTINCT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`)) AS COUNT
   
FROM `AR System Schema`.`HPD:Help Desk`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`SLM:Measurement`
ON (
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` = `SLM:Measurement`.`ApplicationUserFriendlyID`
)
WHERE
 `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assignee Login ID` In ($User) 
 and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved')
GROUP BY __metric__) T1
where SLAStatus IS NOT NULL

SELECT DISTINCT
CurrentDate() __time__, -- DUMMY Just to select timeseries format
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` AS __metric__,
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS COUNT
FROM 
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE 
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company`In ($company)
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved')
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assignee Login ID` In ($User)
Group By 
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority`

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS 'Entry_ID',
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` AS 'time'
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS Created,
SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS OpenInc,
SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority`='Critical' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Critical,
SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` = 'Resolved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Resolved,
SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Re-Opened Date`!= null THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Reopened,
SUM(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` = 'Closed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS Closed,
Date(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`) AS __time__
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
GROUP BY
DATE(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`)
Order By Date(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date`) ASC

meta.rawSql:
SELECT DISTINCT
COUNT(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Entry ID`) AS C1,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` AS C2,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` AS C3
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
GROUP BY
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority`,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`

LIMIT 100

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` != Null THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` ELSE 'Unassigned' END) AS AssignedGroup,
COUNT(1) AS numberofinc,
CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`< 'Resolved' THEN 'Open' ELSE  'Resolved' END as status
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
GROUP BY
AssignedGroup, status
ORDER BY AssignedGroup, status

panels.description: Displays the count of the open incidents by Top 5 support groups

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT
(CASE WHEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` != Null THEN `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` ELSE 'Unassigned' END) AS AssignedGroup,
COUNT(1) AS numberofinc
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk`
WHERE 
 (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company))
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Status`< 'Resolved'
GROUP BY
AssignedGroup
ORDER BY numberofinc DESC
LIMIT 10

panels.title: Top 10 Support Groups with Most Open Incidents

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
Count(`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number`) AS C1,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` AS Status,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` AS Priority,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` AS Assigned_Group
FROM
`HPD:Help Desk` 
WHERE (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company` In ($company)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Assigned Group` In ($AssignedGroup)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($priority)) 
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` < 'Resolved')
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` >= $__from/1000 and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Submit Date` <= $__to/1000)
Group By Status,Priority,Assigned_Group

panels.title: Open incidents cross-tab - Priority and Status

sourceQuery.rawQuery:
SELECT DISTINCT
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` AS C1,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` As Status,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` As Priority,
`HPD:Help Desk`.`InstanceId`,
`SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` as SLAStatusNumber,
    CASE
      WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` IN ('5', '7') THEN 'Already Missed'
      WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 9 THEN 'Close to Target'
      WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 2 THEN 'Stopped Clock'
      WHEN `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` = 1 THEN 'Ongoing'
      ELSE 'SLA Not Applied'
   END AS SLAStatus

FROM 
`HPD:Help Desk`
LEFT OUTER JOIN `AR System Schema`.`SLM:Measurement`
ON (
   `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` = `SLM:Measurement`.`ApplicationUserFriendlyID`
)
WHERE 
`HPD:Help Desk`.`Company`In ($company)
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Status` In ($Status))
and (`HPD:Help Desk`.`Priority` In ($Priority))
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Assignee Login ID` In ($User)
and `HPD:Help Desk`.`Incident Number` In ($MySLA)
and (`SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus` IS NULL Or `SLM:Measurement`.`MeasurementStatus`In($SLAStatusNumber))
